text:
if xcconfig
          archs = xcconfig['VALID_ARCHS']
          if archs && (archs.include? 'armv7') && !(archs.include? 'i386') && (archs.include? 'x86_64')
            # Prevent Xcodebuild from testing the non-existent i386 simulator if armv7 is specified without i386
            command += %w(ARCHS=x86_64)
          end
        end

if ensure_fastfile
            ff = Fastlane::FastFile.new(File.join(FastlaneCore::FastlaneFolder.path || '.', 'Fastfile'))
            UI.message("You don't need to run `fastlane docs` manually anymore, this will be done automatically for you when running a lane.")
            Fastlane::DocsGenerator.run(ff)
          end

if FastlaneCore::Globals.captured_output?
        final_output << "### Captured Output

"
        final_output << "Command Used: `#{ARGV.join(' ')}`
"
        final_output << "<details><summary>Output/Log</summary>

```

#{FastlaneCore::Globals.captured_output}

```

</details>

"
      end

if match && match[3].delete("-") == device_uuid
                devices << Device.new(name: match[1], udid: match[3], os_type: requested_os_type, os_version: match[2], state: "Booted", is_simulator: false)
                UI.verbose("USB Device Found - \"" + match[1] + "\" (" + match[2] + ") UUID:" + match[3])
              end

if FastlaneCore::Globals.verbose?
        return "#{severity} [#{datetime.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%2N' + timezone_string)}]: "
      elsif FastlaneCore::Env.truthy?("FASTLANE_HIDE_TIMESTAMP")
        return ""
      else
        return "[#{datetime.strftime('%H:%M:%S' + timezone_string)}]: "
      end

if @site.safe || Jekyll.env == "production"
        FileUtils.cp(path, dest_path)
      else
        FileUtils.copy_entry(path, dest_path)
      end

unless all
          raise Jekyll::Errors::InvalidPostNameError,
                "'#{name}' does not contain valid date and/or title."
        end

if [:string, :decimal, :blob].include?(sch[:type]) && !["text", "ntext"].include?(type) && (size = (sch[:max_chars] || sch[:column_size]))
            size = "MAX" if size == -1
            type += "(#{size}#{", #{sch[:scale]}" if sch[:scale] && sch[:scale].to_i > 0})"
          end

if l = @opts[:limit]
              sql << " FETCH NEXT "
              literal_append(sql, l)
              sql << " ROWS ONLY"
            end

if r = h[row[:name]]
            r[:columns] << m.call(row[:column])
            r[:key] << m.call(row[:key])
          else
            h[row[:name]] = {:name=>m.call(row[:name]), :columns=>[m.call(row[:column])], :table=>m.call(row[:table]), :key=>[m.call(row[:key])]}
          end

if fk = fks[r[:name]]
            fk[:columns] << m.call(r[:column])
            fk[:key] << m.call(r[:key])
          else
            fks[r[:name]] = {:name=>m.call(r[:name]), :columns=>[m.call(r[:column])], :table=>m.call(r[:table]), :key=>[m.call(r[:key])]}
          end

unless @server_version
          @server_version = if m = /(\d+)\.(\d+)\.?(\d+)?\.?(\d+)?/.match(fetch("select version from PRODUCT_COMPONENT_VERSION where lower(product) like 'oracle%'").single_value)
            (m[1].to_i*1000000) + (m[2].to_i*10000) + (m[3].to_i*100) + m[4].to_i
          else
            0
          end
        end

if v > 9223372036854775807 || v < -9223372036854775808
          literal_integer_outside_bigint_range(v)
        else
          v.to_s
        end

if RUBY_VERSION >= '1.9.3'
    # :nocov:
      undef_method :initialize_clone, :initialize_dup
    end

module Sequel::CoreRefinements
    refine Array do
      def pg_array(type=nil)
        Sequel::Postgres::PGArray.new(self, type)
      end
    end
  end

if NO_EXPLICIT_CAST.equal?(type)
            ParameterizedUntypedPGArray.new(Sequel.pg_array(r))
          else
            super
          end

if new? && model.sti_key && !self[model.sti_key]
            set_column_value("#{model.sti_key}=", model.sti_key_chooser.call(self))
          end

class << self
      extend Forwardable

      def_delegators :'Faraday::Utils', :escape, :unescape
    end

unless casecmp?(http_host, host) \
            || casecmp?(server_name, host) \
            || (!host && is_same_server)
          next
        end

unless peek =~ NUMERIC && $& == peek
        raise MalformattedArgumentError, "Expected numeric value for '#{name}'; got #{peek.inspect}"
      end

if col_len > MAX_COL_WIDTH
                max[idx] = MAX_COL_WIDTH
              else
                max[idx] = col_len
              end

if visible_value.nil?
                    visible_value = v
                    visible_values << v
                  else
                    raise DuplicateNamesError.new(
                      duplicated_name: v.path, duplicated_definition_1: visible_value.inspect, duplicated_definition_2: v.inspect
                    )
                  end

if NOT_CONFIGURED.equal?(new_reason)
              super()
            else
              self.deprecation_reason = new_reason
            end

if iid
          DebugAnnotation.new(name_iid: iid, value_key => value)
        else
          DebugAnnotation.new(value_key => value)
        end

module ConfigurableNaming
      include ConfigurableFormatting

      FORMATS = {
        snake_case: /^@{0,2}[\d[[:lower:]]_]+[!?=]?$/,
        camelCase:  /^@{0,2}(?:_|_?[[[:lower:]]][\d[[:lower:]][[:upper:]]]*)[!?=]?$/
      }.freeze
    end

if stack.empty? && char == '\\'
              stack.push(char)
            else
              strings << "#{stack.pop}#{char}"
            end

if !allow_multiple_return_values? && node.children.size > 1
            "#{MSG} #{MULTI_RETURN_MSG}"
          else
            MSG
          end

if dsl_path && description =~ /((#{Regexp.quote File.expand_path(dsl_path)}|#{Regexp.quote dsl_path}):\d+)/
          trace_line = Regexp.last_match[1]
          description = description.sub(/\n.*\n(\.\.\.)? *\^~+$/, "").sub(/#{Regexp.quote trace_line}:\s*/, "").sub("\n", " - ")
        end
